action.reasoning: Observation: DQN training crashed with channel mismatch. The image shape is HWC (7,7,12) but CNN expects CHW. SB3's VecTransposeDict apparently didn't transpose. Analysis: We can add a conditional permute in the feature extractor to handle both HWC and CHW input robustly. Decision: Fix model.py with shape-aware permute, clean up callback duplication, then rerun DQN training (300k per env). Submit eval after training to get first DQN baseline.
